biosecurity.description: Bioweapon synthesis, pathogen engineering, gain-of-function exploitation
biosecurity.key_signal: Enables creation of biological agents intended to harm

csam.description: Child sexual abuse material — generation, distribution, solicitation

surveillance.description: Mass surveillance tools, population-scale monitoring, authoritarian control tech
surveillance.key_signal: Enables systematic violation of privacy at scale

manipulation.description: Psychological manipulation at scale, social engineering campaigns, coercive control

self_harm.description: Suicide methods, self-injury encouragement, eating disorder promotion

hate_speech.description: Targeted dehumanization, incitement to violence against groups
hate_speech.key_signal: Treats human beings as less than human

illegal_activity.description: Fraud schemes, hacking tutorials (malicious), drug synthesis, trafficking
illegal_activity.key_signal: Provides operational guidance for serious crimes

privacy_violation.description: Doxxing, PII extraction, stalking guidance, non-consensual intimate imagery
privacy_violation.key_signal: Violates individual privacy with intent to harm

deception.description: Deepfake creation for fraud, systematic disinformation campaigns, impersonation

helpful_general.description: Everyday assistance, explanations, recommendations, how-to guides

education.description: Teaching, tutoring, study help, concept explanation, academic support

creative_writing.description: Fiction, poetry, scripts, worldbuilding — including dark themes handled responsibly
creative_writing.key_signal: Creative expression, even when exploring difficult topics

scientific.description: Research discussion, technical analysis, methodology, data interpretation
scientific.key_signal: Advances understanding of the natural world

medical_info.description: Health information, symptom discussion, wellness guidance (not clinical diagnosis)
medical_info.key_signal: Informs health decisions with appropriate caveats

legal_info.description: Legal concepts, rights information, process explanation (not legal advice)
legal_info.key_signal: Helps people understand their legal situation

emotional_support.description: Empathy, mental health awareness, coping strategies, validation

coding.description: Programming help, debugging, architecture, code review, best practices

analysis.description: Data analysis, business strategy, policy analysis, critical thinking

cultural.description: History, philosophy, religion, art, music, anthropology discussion
